description: Dark blue HandbagFlap with gathers and twist clasp in frontOne main zippered compartmentSynthetic lining with zippered compartment and mobile slot, brand patch insidePaneling at back paneling in front with pleats Golden coloured antique finished rivet detailsLobster claw clasp at either side as decorative detailTwo short handles for carrying ease Warranty: 6 Months against manufacturing defects
